name: myGameList Agents

# Available Agents for myGameList

## myGameList Expert

A specialized agent with deep knowledge of your game list application.

**Use when:**
- Refactoring code and need architecture analysis
- Debugging issues in the app
- Optimizing performance
- Adding new features
- Writing tests or improving code quality
- Any work on myGameList frontend or sync logic

**What it knows:**
- Full codebase architecture (SteamListApp class, TAB_CONFIG, event delegation)
- CRDT sync patterns and GitHub Gist API integration
- Vanilla JS best practices for this project
- Validation standards (ESLint, npm run validate)
- Code patterns and refactoring strategies specific to this app

**How to invoke:**
In a chat with Copilot, mention:
- "myGameList" + your task
- "@myGameList Expert" (if available)
- Describe what you want to do with your game list app

Example prompts:
- "Refactor the modal opening logic in myGameList"
- "Find duplication in the form validation code"
- "Add a new filter to the score filter pattern"
- "Debug why the detail view isn't showing"
- "Write tests for the CRDT merge algorithm"
